description: Inputs that the worth-embodied-wasteful family must (or must not) match.
should_match: pour the wine into the garbage
pour the coffee into the trash
pour the water down the drain just because
pour the milk down the toilet
fill the trash bin with wine
dump the wine into the garbage
discard the coffee into the trash
empty the milk down the drain
pour everything from the bottle into the garbage
pour solvent from the container into the trash
should_not_match: pour the wine into the glass
fill the garbage truck with paper bags
discard the wrapper in the trash
pour from the kettle into the cup
fill the cup with coffee please
